class.name: ResonanceAudioEffect
class.brief_description: Audio bus effect for reverb output. Auto-configured by ResonanceRuntime.
class.description: ResonanceAudioEffect is an [AudioEffect] that processes the reverb bus. It is added to the configured reverb bus (see [url=#ResonanceRuntimeConfig]ResonanceRuntimeConfig[/url] [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.reverb_bus_name], Project Settings nexus/resonance/reverb_bus_name) when the plugin or [url=#ResonanceRuntime]ResonanceRuntime[/url] initializes. For Convolution reflection type, it reads from the Steam Audio reflection mixer. For Parametric/Hybrid, reverb is applied per-source in [ResonancePlayer]; when bus != reverb_bus (split output), reverb is routed to a separate child player on reverb_bus. Adjust [member gain_db] for reverb bus volume. Bus name and send target are configurable via [url=#ResonanceRuntimeConfig]ResonanceRuntimeConfig[/url] or Project Settings.

members.member: Volume correction in dB for the reverb bus. 0 = unity.
